response.justification: Strong, broad engineering generalist with ~13+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic), a BS in CS, and proficiency in several required languages (JavaScript, C#, Java, C/C++). However, the resume shows essentially no direct experience with growth, experimentation/A-B testing, feature-flagging, telemetry platforms, or statistical/experimental analysis—the core of this Principal IC6 role. Title trajectory tops out at Staff, and there is no demonstrated cross-team platform-building or 'systemic solutions that unblock multiple teams' at the scale this role demands. Worth a screen to probe data/experimentation depth, but the role-specific gap is significant.
strengths: Deep, polyglot engineering experience across distributed/high-throughput systems and multiple required languages
Strong software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev) plus relevant AI-agent/tooling work
BS in Computer Science and 13+ years of production experience, exceeding the 8-year bar
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, feature-flagging, or telemetry/metrics-platform experience—the role's core
No evidence of high data aptitude or statistical/experimental analysis work
Seniority and scope below Principal/IC6 expectations (no cross-team platform leadership shown)

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated data/statistical analysis aptitude
